things.name: uShaka Marine World
things.description: One of the world's top aquariums with whale sharks, and the best beaches in Africa

things.name: Golden Mile Beach
things.description: 5km of warm Indian Ocean beach - the best surf city in South Africa

things.name: Victoria Street Market (Indian Market)
things.description: South Africa's largest Indian market with spices, saris and religious artefacts

things.name: Hluhluwe-iMfolozi Park
things.description: World's oldest game reserve - the park that saved the white rhino from extinction

things.name: Moses Mabhida Stadium
things.description: 2010 FIFA World Cup stadium with a cable car ride up the great arch

things.name: iSimangaliso Wetland Park
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage park with hippos, crocodiles and humpback whale sightings

things.name: Drakensberg Mountains Day Trip
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage Giant's Castle with Bushman rock art and dramatic escarpment views

things.name: Umhlanga Rocks
things.description: Upmarket beach suburb with the famous red-and-white lighthouse

things.name: KwaMuhle Museum
things.description: Museum of Durban's apartheid history in the former Department of Native Administration

things.name: Bunny Chow
things.description: Durban's most famous street food - half a loaf of white bread hollowed out and filled with curry
